description: You are a wind farm operations analyst preparing a performance report for a 50 MW wind farm in central Iowa (20 × GE 2.5 MW turbines). Using the data in the 'Turbine_Production' sheet of C:\Users\Docker\Documents\wind_farm_production.xlsx, complete the 'Turbine_Annual_Summary' and 'Monthly_Farm_Summary' sheets. In 'Turbine_Annual_Summary', calculate Total_Production_MWh, Total_Hours, Total_Downtime_Hrs, Available_Hours, Availability_Pct, Gross_Capacity_Factor_Pct, Net_Capacity_Factor_Pct, Annual_Revenue_USD (at $45/MWh), Turbine_Row, and Performance_Flag ('UNDERPERFORMING' if Gross CF < 28, 'REVIEW' if < 32) for each turbine and farm totals. In 'Monthly_Farm_Summary', calculate monthly Farm_Production_MWh, Farm_Capacity_Factor_Pct, Avg_Wind_Speed_ms, Total_Downtime_Hrs, Farm_Availability_Pct, Monthly_Revenue_USD, Front_Row_Avg_CF_Pct, Back_Row_Avg_CF_Pct, and Wake_Loss_Pct, including annual totals. Save the workbook to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\wind_farm_production.xlsx.
